record.caption: Record — real footage · driving our MockMed demo app
record.alt: Screen recording of a nurse completing an add-note task in a clinical web app while OpenAdapt captures every screen and input.

compile.caption: Compile — crafted annotation over a real recorded frame
compile.alt: The recorded demonstration compiled into an editable script: visual anchor targets, a per-step assertion, and a parameter.

run.caption: Run — real footage · driving our MockMed demo app
run.alt: OpenAdapt replaying the compiled workflow automatically and locally in seconds, with no per-run model calls.

heal.caption: Self-heal — real footage · driving our MockMed demo app
heal.alt: OpenAdapt replaying against a drifted UI: the fallback ladder still finds each target and proposes the anchor fix as a reviewable diff.

audit.caption: Audit — real footage · driving our MockMed demo app
audit.alt: The illustrated run report OpenAdapt produces for every run: what ran, what it saw, and what changed, with per-step screenshots.

record_openemr.caption: Record — real footage · driving a live OpenEMR instance
record_openemr.alt: OpenAdapt's recorder capturing a real session in a live OpenEMR electronic health record: signing in and opening the patient workflow while every screen and input is captured.

run_openemr.caption: Run — real footage · driving a live OpenEMR instance
run_openemr.alt: OpenAdapt replaying a compiled workflow against a live OpenEMR electronic health record, locally and with no per-run model calls.
